CustomField.formula: OR( Component_1_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_2_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_3_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_4_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_5_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_6_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_7_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_8_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_9_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c, Component_10_Parameter__r.Is_Mandatory__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when at least one selected component parameter is flagged mandatory.
CustomField.label: Has Mandatory Component
